name: KOOS
title: Knee Injury and Osteoarthritis Outcome Score (KOOS, English LK1.0)

code.display: Knee injury and Osteoarthritis Outcome Score (KOOS) [Reported]

item.text: This survey asks for your view about your knee. Answer every question by choosing the appropriate response, thinking of your knee symptoms during the last week.
Symptoms (last week)
Do you have swelling in your knee?
Do you feel grinding, hear clicking or any other type of noise when your knee moves?
Does your knee catch or hang up when moving?
Can you straighten your knee fully?
Can you bend your knee fully?
Stiffness (last week)
How severe is your knee joint stiffness after first wakening in the morning?
How severe is your knee stiffness after sitting, lying or resting later in the day?
Pain (last week)
How often do you experience knee pain?
Twisting/pivoting on your knee
Straightening knee fully
Bending knee fully
Walking on a flat surface
Going up or down stairs
At night while in bed
Sitting or lying
Standing upright
Function, daily living (last week)
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Descending stairs
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Ascending stairs
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Rising from sitting
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Standing
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Bending to floor / pick up an object
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Walking on flat surface
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Getting in/out of car
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Going shopping
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Putting on socks/stockings
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Rising from bed
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Taking off socks/stockings
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Lying in bed (turning over, maintaining knee position)
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Getting in/out of bath
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Sitting
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Getting on/off toilet
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Heavy domestic duties (moving heavy boxes, scrubbing floors, etc.)
What degree of difficulty have you experienced: Light domestic duties (cooking, dusting, etc.)
Function, sports and recreational activities (last week)
What degree of difficulty: Squatting
What degree of difficulty: Running
What degree of difficulty: Jumping
What degree of difficulty: Twisting/pivoting on your injured knee
What degree of difficulty: Kneeling
Quality of life
How often are you aware of your knee problem?
Have you modified your lifestyle to avoid potentially damaging activities to your knee?
How troubled are you with lack of confidence in your knee?
In general, how much difficulty do you have with your knee?
